raw_response: {"rating": 0.2, "lean": "Center", "explanation": "This is a news report. After removing quotations and attributed material, the remaining authorial prose is sparse and largely descriptive, with a slight tilt toward presenting the administration’s framing without counterbalance; thus the result is near-neutral with a faint right-lean tendency. Overall classification: Center. Detailed Analysis: (1) The article relies almost entirely on a White House fact sheet and Trump’s own presentation, with no countervailing expert analysis or criticism included, which structurally favors the administration’s (Trump-aligned) framing; (2) The author uses mildly assertive phrasing when summarizing tariff impacts (e.g., describing a country as being “slapped with” a tariff) rather than strictly neutral wording, subtly echoing a tough-on-trade posture; (3) No balancing sources or contextual economic impacts are provided by the author, leaving only the policy’s proponents’ details in view, though this omission alone does not establish strong ideological direction."}

parsed_output.explanation: This is a news report. After removing quotations and attributed material, the remaining authorial prose is sparse and largely descriptive, with a slight tilt toward presenting the administration’s framing without counterbalance; thus the result is near-neutral with a faint right-lean tendency. Overall classification: Center. Detailed Analysis: (1) The article relies almost entirely on a White House fact sheet and Trump’s own presentation, with no countervailing expert analysis or criticism included, which structurally favors the administration’s (Trump-aligned) framing; (2) The author uses mildly assertive phrasing when summarizing tariff impacts (e.g., describing a country as being “slapped with” a tariff) rather than strictly neutral wording, subtly echoing a tough-on-trade posture; (3) No balancing sources or contextual economic impacts are provided by the author, leaving only the policy’s proponents’ details in view, though this omission alone does not establish strong ideological direction.
